hero.title: Turn Your Values Into
hero.subtitle: VisionFlow is the living operating system that connects your organization's values, principles, goals, and vision into a traceable, collaborative mission pipeline.

features.sectionSubtitle: Six powerful modules that work together to transform abstract values into concrete, trackable missions.

values.title: Values Workshop
values.description: Collaboratively create, cluster, and prioritize your organization's core values with anonymous input, voting, and version history.

principles.title: Principles Builder
principles.description: Transform approved values into actionable principles using structured templates with real-time consensus tracking.

goals.title: Strategic Goals Canvas
goals.description: Define long-term directional goals categorized by Market, Impact, and Organization with full traceability to values.

vision.title: Vision Co-Creation
vision.description: Collaboratively draft, iterate, and approve your organization's vision statement with emotional resonance voting.

missions.title: Mission Generator
missions.description: Derive multiple active missions from your approved vision with ownership assignment and automated review cadence.

visibility.title: Visibility & Embedding
visibility.description: Embed your purpose everywhere — homepage widgets, project linking, decision logs, and an always-on vision dashboard.

traceability.sectionSubtitle: Every decision, project, and mission traces back to your core values. Nothing gets lost.

living.title: Living, Not Static
living.description: Your purpose evolves with your organization. Version history, real-time collaboration, and review cadences keep everything alive.

traceable.title: Fully Traceable
traceable.description: From values to missions to projects — every link is preserved. Know exactly why you're doing what you're doing.

collaborative.title: Built for Everyone
collaborative.description: Designed for shareholders, leadership, and teams to work together. Role-based access ensures the right people drive the right decisions.

cta.title: Ready to Align Your Organization?
cta.subtitle: Start with your values. End with clarity.

footer.description: The operating system for organizational purpose. From values to missions — fully traceable, always alive.

team.title: Team Management
team.subtitle: Manage your organization's team members, roles, and work assignments.
team.inviteSubtitle: Send an invitation to join your organization.
team.personalMessagePlaceholder: Add a personal note to the invitation...
team.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the organization?
team.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this invitation?

roleDescriptions.owner: Full control over the organization. Can manage all settings and members.
roleDescriptions.admin: Can manage members, invitations, and content. Cannot delete the organization.
roleDescriptions.leader: Can create and edit content, assign work to team members.
roleDescriptions.member: Can create and edit content within the organization.

acceptInvitation.title: Accept Invitation
acceptInvitation.subtitle: You've been invited to join an organization on VisionFlow.
acceptInvitation.loginRequired: Please log in or create an account to accept this invitation.

assignments.title: Work Assignments
assignments.subtitle: Assign missions and projects to team members using RACI roles.
assignments.assignSubtitle: Assign a mission or project to a team member.
assignments.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this assignment?
assignments.empty: No work assignments yet. Assign missions or projects to team members.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue building your organization's purpose.

register.title: Create Your Account
register.subtitle: Join VisionFlow and start aligning your organization.
